routes.name: Main Route
routes.description: Follow the 2020 protest route from Westlake toward Capitol Hill and the streets that became CHOP.

stops.name: Westlake Station
stops.description: A downtown gathering point where marchers began moving east toward Capitol Hill during the 2020 protests.

stops.name: 11th & Pine
stops.description: A defining CHOP intersection where protest, mutual aid, public debate, and community presence converged.

stops.name: Cal Anderson Park
stops.description: A central CHOP gathering space where people rested, organized, shared resources, and returned throughout the summer of 2020.
